editcheck-dialog-addref-description: Help readers understand where this information is coming from by adding a citation.
editcheck-dialog-addref-reject-question: Why are you not adding a citation?
editcheck-dialog-addref-reject-descripti: Other editors would value learning more about your decision not to add a citation.
editcheck-dialog-addref-reject-irrelevan: I don't think citations are relevant to the change I'm making
editcheck-dialog-addref-reject-common-kn: The information I'm adding is widely known
editcheck-dialog-addref-reject-uncertain: I'm not sure what citation to add
editcheck-dialog-addref-success-notify: Thank you for adding a citation!
editcheck-copyvio-description: Please avoid copying text from other sources, even if rephrased or cited. This could be considered [{{int:editcheck-copyvio-descriptionlink}} copyright violation or plagiarism] and may result in your content being removed or your account being blocked.
editcheck-copyvio-keep-description: Please help other editors of this article understand your reason to keep the pasted text.
editcheck-copyvio-keep-wrote: I wrote this content and it's not published elsewhere
editcheck-copyvio-keep-notify: Thank you for sharing your reason to keep the pasted text!
editcheck-copyvio-remove-notify: Thank you for helping to keep knowledge freely available!
editcheck-double-bold-description: Bold is applied automatically to subheadings, definition list terms and table headers. Help readers by removing [{{int:editcheck-double-bold-descriptionlink}} unnecessary bold formatting] from these elements.
editcheck-preference-suggestions-descrip: Community-configured edit suggestions for improving articles. Available in [[:mw:Special:MyLanguage/VisualEditor|visual editor]].
editcheck-tone-description: Other users often revise this kind of wording, saying the tone is unbalanced. [{{int:editcheck-tone-descriptionlink}} Learn more]
editcheck-tone-description-acted: Look out for expressions that are flattering, disparaging, vague, cliché, or endorsing of a particular viewpoint.
editcheck-tone-reject-uncertain: I'm not sure how to revise the tone
editcheck-yearlink-description: This link points to a different year than the one shown in the text. Help make the article more accurate by updating the displayed year and linked year to match.
editcheck-external-link-description: This link points to an [{{int:editcheck-external-link-descriptionlink}} external website]. Help readers stay focused on the content by removing this link, moving it to the “External links” section, or converting it into a [{{int:editcheck-external-link-convertlink}} citation] if appropriate.
editcheck-duplicate-link-description: This link appears more than once in this section. Help readers navigate more easily by removing [{{int:editcheck-duplicate-link-descriptionlink}} repeated links].
editcheck-disambiguation-title: Link to a more specific page
editcheck-disambiguation-description: This link points to a [{{int:editcheck-disambiguation-descriptionlink}} disambiguation page]. Help readers find the right topic by linking to a more specific page.
editcheck-headinglevels-description: This heading level may not follow the correct sequential structure. Help readers navigate the content more easily by using the correct [{{int:editcheck-headinglevels-descriptionlink}} heading level].
editcheck-image-caption-description: This image does not have a caption. Help readers understand why the image is relevant by adding a [{{int:editcheck-image-caption-descriptionlink}} short caption].
editcheck-convertreference-description: This reference is missing details. Help readers understand where the information is coming from by converting this into a formatted [{{int:editcheck-convertreference-descriptionlink}} reference]. After converting it, check the accuracy of the details that the tool has added, and remove anything that is wrong or confusing.
editcheck-reject-description: Other editors would value learning why you made this choice.
editcheck-specialeditchecks-info: Edit checks are configured at [[MediaWiki:Editcheck-config.json]]. For documentation, see [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Edit_check/Configuration Edit check/Configuration].
editcheck-specialeditchecks-disabled: Edit checks are not enabled on this wiki.
tag-editcheck-reference-decline-common-k: EditCheck reference was declined as common knowledge
tag-editcheck-reference-decline-irreleva: EditCheck reference was declined as irrelevant
tag-editcheck-reference-decline-other-de: EditCheck reference was declined for an unlisted reason
tag-editcheck-reference-decline-uncertai: EditCheck reference was declined as being uncertain
